title: Needham Raises TeraWulf Stock Price Target to $28 on HPC Growth
text: Needham raised its price target on TeraWulf (WULF) to $28 from $22 and maintains a Buy rating on the shares. The upgrade was based on expectations that TeraWulf's Kentucky site is one of the next sites in the sector to secure a lease agreement. Needham raised its price target following TeraWulf's Q1 2026 results, which showed a 117% quarter-over-quarter rise in HPC lease revenue to $21 million, although this was partially offset by a 50% decline in mining revenue to $13 million. The analyst's rationale centered on the company's strong performance and the strategic positioning of its new facilities to capture AI and HPC demand. According to 10 analysts, TeraWulf (WULF) has a Buy consensus rating as of May 11, 2026, with Needham's upgrade being part of a broader positive sentiment shift.
